snippet.title: Anime “Dragon Ball Super: Beerus” | SUPER GEKITOU Trailer
snippet.description:
The SUPER Brawl between Goku and Beerus!
At the end, Frieza is seen awaiting his resurrection ――

Series Premieres in Fall of 2026!
The anime Dragon Ball Super, original work, story, and character design by Akira Toriyama, is set to begin anew as Dragon Ball Super: Beerus in Fall 2026!

#dragonball #dragonballsuper

◾️Anime “Dragon Ball Super: Beerus” | SUPER Launch Trailer
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=OOmRInABehI

◾️INTRODUCTION
The globally beloved manga DRAGON BALL by Akira Toriyama continues to captivate fans through a wide range of media—from TV animation, movies, games, and merchandising—standing as a top-ranked title with extraordinary worldwide popularity. 
Now, in 2026, the anime Dragon Ball Super, original work, story, and character design by Akira Toriyama, is set to begin anew as Dragon Ball Super: Beerus! This ENHANCED edition introduces a large volume of newly added and redrawn cuts, as well as a reconstructed narrative. With cutting-edge visual expression, the series delivers even more immersive battle scenes and a more faithful representation of the original manga—bringing an ENHANCED edition to life like never before.

Several years have passed since the fierce battle against Majin Buu, and Earth has finally regained a brief moment of peace. At the same time, Beerus, the God of Destruction, awakens from his long, deep sleep. Even Kai and Supreme Kai, aware of Beerus’s overwhelming power to destroy entire planets, watch his awakening with great fear… Meanwhile, Beerus hears rumors of a Saiyan who defeated Frieza—and suddenly appears before Goku.
Targeted by Beerus, the strongest being in the universe, Earth is in grave danger. Thus begins an Earth-shattering cosmic battle between the God of Destruction and Goku and his allies—a conflict that will shake the entire universe.

Original Work, Story & Character Design: Akira Toriyama
 
■Dragon Ball Super: Beerus Official Website     https://dragonball-super.com/en/
■Anime Dragon Ball Official X　               　       https://x.com/DB_anime_info
■DRAGON BALL Official Website           　          https://en.dragon-ball-official.com/
■DRAGON BALL Official X           　           　       https://x.com/DB_official_en

©BIRD STUDIO/SHUEISHA, TOEI ANIMATION

snippet.title: La CHUTE de FORTNITE a COMMENCÉ
snippet.description:
Fortnite a changé le monde du jeu vidéo à jamais. Mais aujourd'hui, le géant vacille. 📉 Entre la saturation du Battle Royale, les collaborations à outrance et l'essoufflement du modèle "Metaverse", la chute semble avoir commencé.

Dans cette vidéo, on analyse pourquoi Epic Games est en train de perdre le contrôle de son propre phénomène. Est-ce une fin inévitable ou une simple mutation ? On décortique les chiffres et les erreurs stratégiques.

Script rédigé par JÉRÉMIE LEGER

 #Fortnite #EpicGames #JeuxVidéo #Analyse #GamingNews #Iconoclaste

snippet.title: [Official Trailer] WU อู #WUTheSeries
snippet.description:
พีท (นานิ หิรัญกฤษฎิ์) ชายหนุ่มผู้อับโชคซึ่งมีเศษวิญญาณปีศาจอยู่ในตัว ทำให้สัมผัสได้ถึง เหยาพลังงานประหลาดที่ออกมากลืนกินพลังชีวิตของผู้คน จึงได้พบกับ นิรันดร์ (สกาย วงศ์รวี) ชายหนุ่มที่นำพาให้เขาเข้าไปในโลกแห่ง “อู” ทั้งสองได้กลายเป็นคู่หูจำเป็นและได้รวบรวมทีมเพื่อร่วมกันปราบเหยาและปัดเป่าสิ่งชั่วร้าย!
 
 นิรันดร์ พีท และทีมปราบปีศาจจะร่วมมือกันผ่านพ้นอุปสรรคได้ไหม และความสัมพันธ์ของทั้งคู่จะผูกพันกันด้วยจิตวิญญาณได้อย่างไร ติดตามได้ใน “WU อู” ทุกวันอังคาร เวลา 20:30 น. ทางช่อง GMM25 รับชมย้อนหลังที่แรกได้ที่ VIU เวลา 21:30 น. เริ่ม 5 พฤษภาคมนี้
กำกับซีรีส์ : วาสุเทพ เกตุเพ็ชร์

snippet.title: Manelele Viitorului - DU-TE DU-TE (Official Video)
snippet.description:
💔🔥 Manelele Viitorului – DU-TE DU-TE (Official Video)

„Haide du-te du-te du-te… te trec la iubiri pierdute” 💔
Dacă ai trecut printr-o relație care te-a terminat… piesa asta e pentru tine.

🎶 „DU-TE DU-TE” este o manea de despărțire cu atitudine, nerv și vibe de balans, genul ăla de piesă pe care o pui tare și zici: gata, s-a terminat!

💥 Refrenul este extrem de catchy și făcut să prindă peste tot:
👉 TikTok
👉 mașină
👉 chefuri

💭 Dar vine momentul în care zici:
👉 „ia du-te-n durerea mea!”

🔥 Fix stilul Manelele Viitorului:
👉 emoție + nerv + adevăr + vibe de hit

📲 Scrie în comentarii:
👉 Ai zis vreodată „du-te” din toată inima? 😤

🔔 Abonează-te la Manelele Viitorului pentru cele mai reale și virale manele din 2026!

🎼 CREDITS

snippet.title: Céline Dion - Dansons (Vidéo officielle)
snippet.description:
Céline Dion - Dansons (Vidéo officielle)

À propos du réalisateur : « Max Allouche est un jeune auteur et réalisateur de mini-séries sur Instagram qui célèbrent l’amour et les rencontres. Très actif sur les réseaux, il a proposé à différents artistes (chanteur, humoriste, violoniste, danseuse) de participer à ce clip. On peut retrouver la grande danseuse classique Victoria Dauberville et son conjoint Mathieu Forget, la violoniste Esther Abrami, l’humoriste Lola Dubini et la jeune artiste Oria entre autres »
//
About the director: Max Allouche is a young writer and director of mini-series on Instagram that celebrate love and new encounters. Highly active on social media, he invited various artists (a singer, a comedian, a violinist and a dancer) to take part in this music video. Featured artists include the renowned classical dancer Victoria Dauberville and her partner Mathieu Forget, violinist Esther Abrami, comedian Lola Dubini and the young artist Oria, amongst others.”

Max Allouche – https://www.instagram.com/maxallou
Victoria Dauberville - www.youtube.com/@victoriadauberville
Mathieu Forget - www.youtube.com/@Forgetmat
Esther Abrami - www.youtube.com/@estherabrami
Lola Dubini - www.youtube.com/@LolaDubini
Oria - www.youtube.com/@oria_off

Listen to Dansons: https://CelineDion.lnk.to/Dansons
Shop LPs and more: https://CelineDion.lnk.to/SMCStoreAY  
Sign up for updates: https://CelineDion.lnk.to/NewsletterAY 
Official website: https://www.celinedion.com/
Download or stream: https://CelineDion.lnk.to/ArtistPagesAY

Follow Céline Dion: 
Facebook: https://CelineDion.lnk.to/followFI
Instagram: https://CelineDion.lnk.to/followII
X: https://CelineDion.lnk.to/followTI
Threads: https://CelineDion.lnk.to/ThreadsTH
Website: https://CelineDion.lnk.to/followWI
TikTok: https://CelineDion.lnk.to/followYx
Spotify: https://CelineDion.lnk.to/followSI
YouTube: https://CelineDion.lnk.to/subscribeYD

Paroles :
Dansons, au-dessus des abîmes
aux arêtes des cimes
et les bas fonds quittons
volons, valsons
 
Dansons, quand le monde vacille
sur un pas, sur un fil
à nos corps emmêlés,
nos mains nouées
 
Pour oublier nos peines
Que rien ne nous retienne, (ne nous retienne)
 
Dansons, au-dessus des grands vides
que nos souffles nous guident
les corps à l’unisson
jouez violons
 
Dansons, ce soir il y a bal
au milieu des étoiles,
envers et contre nous
doux rendez-vous
 
Flottons, front contre front
Flocons, sur l’horizon (flocons sur l'horizon)
 
Dansons pour être et rester droits
Parce qu’on se le doit
Pour tous les immobiles
Tous les sans voix ni loi
Parce que c’est inutile
Parce que toi et moi
Nos visages, nos bras
Malgré tout puisqu’on ne peut danser que debout
 
Dansons, inventons nos vertiges
avant que l’on se fige
quand l’univers hostile
une idylle, une île
 
Dansons au-dessus des abîmes
aux arêtes des cimes
tournons puisque le monde
ne tourne plus rond

Abel Memmi

Oria

Simon Levy

Official video for "Focu 'Ranni” by ROSALÍA

'LUX (Complete Works)' Out Now https://ROSALIA.lnk.to/LUXComplete
Shop 'LUX' https://rosalia.lnk.to/lux-store

Directed by Petra Collins 

LYRICS: 
Ya yo me solté la coleta
quería ir de blanco y fui de violeta
la arena que en tus manos la sujetas
resbala de tus puños si la aprietas

Mejor hablar
ahora que
callarme para siempre
y puedo decir
que estoy en paz
por mi lao

No seré tu mitad
nunca de tu propiedad
seré mía
y de mi libertad

Lo que se construyó con amor
es más difícil de incendiar
pero habrá fuegos que
no podrás apagar

Ya nadie tirará arroz al cielo
ya no habrá borrachera ni flores
ya no habrá nadie que bendiga
un amor que en verdad desconoce

Grabé tu nombre en mis costillas
pero mi corazón nunca tuvo tus iniciales
tarde o temprano el destino te golpea
aunque ignores sus señales

(Siciliano)
Tu
u me focu ‘ranni
mi jittaiu nta lu nenti
pi nun pèrdiri a libbirta’
E l’amure senza liggi
è l’unicu c’accittassi
mi jeccu nta lu nenti
prima d’abbruciarimi

snippet.title: Warhammer 40,000: Dawn of War 4 - Official Adeptus Mechanicus CGI Trailer
snippet.description:
Watch the latest Warhammer 40,000: Dawn of War 4 CGI trailer for this upcoming real-time strategy game. Witness the cold precision of the Adeptus Mechanicus and their unwavering devotion to the Machine God. Warhammer 40,000: Dawn of War 4 will be available on PC in 2026.

Led by Magos Dominus Nulpherus-1, an expedition breaches the depths of a dormant Necron Tomb on Kronus in pursuit of forbidden knowledge. As the Necron legions awaken, the Adeptus Mechanicus must make a choice. Undeterred by the imminent Xenos threat, the Adeptus Mechanicus press forward with calculated resolve. 

All knowledge is sacred for the Adeptus Mechanicus and all must be known by the Machine. 

This is the will of the Omnissiah.

Brawl Stars est un jeu mobile multijoueur développé par Supercell. Il propose des affrontements rapides et dynamiques en 3 contre 3 ou en solo, avec des parties courtes et intenses.

snippet.title: 007 First Light - Tribute Trailer
snippet.description:
Pre-order 007 First Light now to unlock 4 exclusive outfit skins, Gleaming items pack, and 24H early access.

https://bit.ly/007FirstLightPre-Order

007 First Light comes to PlayStation®5, Xbox Series X|S, and PC on May 27th, 2026, and Nintendo Switch 2 this summer.

Our channels 
Visit the website: https://www.007FirstLightGame.com 
Discord: https://www.discord.gg/007FirstLight 
Twitter: https://x.com/007Gameioi 
TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@007gameioi 
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/007GameIOI/ 
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/007Gameioi 
Bluesky: https://bsky.app/profile/007game.ioi.dk 
Twitch: https://www.twitch.tv/007Gameioi 
Reddit: https://www.reddit.com/r/007FirstLight/

Earn the Number. 007 First Light is a thrilling espionage action-adventure game from IO Interactive. Follow James Bond as a young, resourceful and sometimes reckless recruit in MI6's training programme, and discover an origin story of the world’s most famous spy.

ABOUT IO INTERACTIVE 
IO Interactive is an independent videogame developer and publisher with studios in Copenhagen, Malmö, Barcelona, Istanbul, and Brighton. As the creative force behind some of the most talked-about multiplatform video games in the last two decades, IOI is dedicated to creating unforgettable characters and experiences using their award-winning proprietary Glacier technology. IO Interactive will develop and publish a reimagined James Bond origin story with 007 First Light and is currently developing a new IP under the codename Project Fantasy. For more information, visit: https://ioi.dk.
